- [x] Scaffolded Vite React project for Koraq web showcase
- [x] Customized site for Koraq features and premium fintech design
- [x] All actions prompt to download the app, no web actions
- [ ] Update README.md with project info

## Project Requirements
- Simple website for Koraq app
- Features: Dashboard, Add Transaction, History, Reports, Offline-first
- Premium fintech look: dark background, emerald green for profit, soft red for loss, electric blue accent
- All actions direct to app download

## Development Rules
- Use '.' as project root
- No backend or data storage
- No interactive actions except download links
- Keep explanations concise
- README.md and copilot-instructions.md must be up to date

## Next Steps
- Update README.md with Koraq-specific info
- Ensure documentation is complete
